name: autolabos-research-governor
description: Codex-native governance harness for evidence-gated research runs.

interface.shortDescription: Govern Codex research work with evidence gates.
interface.longDescription: AutoLabOS Research Governor helps Codex create governed briefs, audit research artifacts, enforce claim ceilings, and strengthen weak research nodes through evidence gates.
defaultPrompt: Audit this run for paper readiness.
